children.text: Here's what our valued customers have to say about their experiences at Rose Restaurant. We're proud to have created memorable dining moments for our guests.

"The culinary experience at Rose Restaurant is simply unparalleled. Each dish is a masterpiece, blending traditional flavors with modern techniques. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, making it perfect for both casual dinners and special occasions."

notes: Star row can be preserved as icon group instead of literal badge text.

children.text: "As someone who's passionate about food, I can confidently say that Rose Restaurant offers one of the most authentic and delightful dining experiences in the city. The attention to detail in every aspect, from the menu to the service, is truly impressive."

notes: Star row can be preserved as icon group instead of literal badge text.
